# DPDP SDK

An SDK to interact with the DPDP Compliance Platform.

## Installation

```bash
npm install dpdp-sdk
```

## Usage

```typescript
import DPDPClient from 'dpdp-sdk';

const client = new DPDPClient('YOUR_API_KEY', 'http://localhost:3006');

// Create user
const userUID = await client.createUser();

// Store permission
const permissionId = await client.storePermission(userUID, {
  subject: 'marketing',
  description: 'Email Marketing'
});

// View permission
const result = await client.viewPermission(userUID, permissionId);
```
